<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v2/applications/{uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.overview</b> authority for authenticated user

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"url":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the merchant's web site (e-shop)","minLength":0,"maxLength":1000}},"title":"FinancingMerchantOrder"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier, specified by the partner (eshop, POS shop)","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"specificSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"specific symbol","minLength":0,"maxLength":10},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Order status","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","CANCELED","PAID","TERMINATED"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","pattern":"^\\d{0,10}$"}},"title":"FinancingV2Order"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of the financed subject","enum":["CASH","LIABILITY","ORDER","WALLET"]},"wallet":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"financing":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"shoppingWallet":{"type":"object","properties":{"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Code of product set"}},"title":"FinancingSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Wallet financing type","enum":["SHOPPING_WALLET"]}},"title":"FinancingWalletFinancing"}},"title":"FinancingWalletBase"}},"title":"FinancingV2FinancedSubject"},"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"originationContext":{"type":"object","properties":{"cancelDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date the application was/will be cancelled"},"createdDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date the application has been created"}},"title":"FinancingV2OriginationContext"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Application status","enum":["CREATED","VERIFICATION","PRESCORED","APPROVED","REJECTED","ALTERNATIVE","CONFIRMED","CANCELLED"]},"workflowSteps":{"type":"array","description":"Collection of application process actions available for current application status","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"cancellation":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ANOTHER_APPLICATION_IN_PROGRESS","DIFFERENT_REGISTER_DATA","INCONSISTENT_VERIFICATION_DATA","MISMATCH_REPRESENTATIVE","MISSING_OFFER","PARAMETERS_CHANGED","UNDEFINED","UNSUPPORTED_CLIENT_SEGMENT","UNSUPPORTED_PROCESS","VERIFICATION_INVALID","WITHDRAWAL_FROM_CONTRACT"]}},"title":"Cancellation"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Workflow code","enum":["CANCELLATION","DELIVERY","REDIRECT"]},"mandatory":{"type":"boolean","description":"Is the step mandatory"},"priority":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Priority of the workflowstep"},"redirect":{"type":"object","properties":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Redirect user to this URL to complete this application."}},"title":"FinancingRedirectUrl"}},"title":"FinancingWorkflowStep"}}},"title":"FinancingV2Application"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
